description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lantern that uses a reusable workflow call. Define a build job matrix that runs on different operating systems (macOS, ubuntu, windows) and versions (cpu, cu11.8, cu12.4) with varying runners (ubuntu-latest, self-hosted, macos-13, windows-2022). For each job, install system dependencies, check out the repository, set up cmake 3.25.1, and optionally install CUDA and CuDNN based on the matrix configuration. Run cmake, build libraries, and upload artifacts to S3 or GitHub Actions artifacts depending on the workflow and event type.
